name: HM MOVE – Diagnostics
title: Specialty Diagnostics & Precision Health Access
description:
HM Move is an advanced diagnostics gateway designed for those who seek more than routine testing. Through an exclusive network of globally accredited laboratories and specialized scientific partners, we provide access to cutting-edge diagnostic capabilities at the forefront of modern medicine.

Engineered for precision, HM Move delivers deep clinical intelligence, early risk detection, and predictive health insights—enabling a more informed, proactive approach to lifelong health.
features: Curated access to advanced and specialty diagnostic ecosystems
Integrated metabolomics, genomics & multi-omics capabilities
Early detection with predictive health intelligence
Global network of niche and accredited laboratory partners
Insight-driven digital reports designed for clinical clarity

name: Metabolomics
title: Biochemical Health Signals
description: A sophisticated exploration of your body’s biochemical activity—revealing health signals at the most fundamental, cellular level.
features: Identifies disease signals before symptoms emerge
Advanced cellular and metabolic pathway intelligence
Uncovers subtle imbalances often missed in routine testing
Enables truly proactive, preventive health strategies

name: Multi-Omics Solutions
title: Intelligent View of Human Health
description: A unified, multi-layered approach combining genomics, proteomics, and metabolomics to deliver a complete, intelligent view of human health.
features: Comprehensive biological data integration
Precision medicine at a systems level
Deep correlation of genetic, protein, and metabolic markers
Enhanced clinical insight for personalized care decisions

name: Genomics
title: Genetic Blueprint Insights
description: A refined understanding of your genetic blueprint—unlocking insights into inherited risks and future health trajectories.
features: Advanced genetic risk and predisposition analysis
Identification of hereditary health conditions
Long-term health forecasting and planning
Personalized, preventive healthcare strategies

name: HM EASY – Home Collection
title: Doorstep Sample Collection
description: HM Easy redefines convenience in diagnostics by delivering professional, discreet, and clinically precise sample collection services directly to your home—ensuring comfort without compromise.
features: Certified and highly trained phlebotomy professionals
Flexible scheduling tailored to your lifestyle
Strict adherence to hygiene and clinical safety standards
Seamless coordination with advanced diagnostic laboratories
Reliable, accurate, and timely sample handling

name: HM TRUST – Doctor Home Visits
title: Medical Care at Your Doorstep
description: HM Trust brings clinical excellence to your home, offering access to experienced and qualified doctors who deliver personalized, attentive medical care in a familiar environment.
features: Doctor-at-home consultations with experienced practitioners
Comprehensive physical evaluation and diagnosis
Personalized prescriptions and treatment guidance
Ongoing follow-up and care coordination
A patient-first, high-touch care experience

name: HM RELY – NRI Care
title: Healthcare Management for Families in India
description: HM Rely offers a refined healthcare management experience for Non-Resident Indians—ensuring that loved ones in India receive consistent, coordinated, and high-quality care with complete transparency.
features: End-to-end management of family healthcare needs
Integrated diagnostics, doctor visits, and home care services
Real-time updates and structured health reporting
Dedicated care coordination and support
Confidence and peace of mind—no matter where you are

name: HM OHR – Health Records
title: Digital Health Records Management
description: HM OHR is a secure, intelligent health data platform designed to organize, protect, and provide seamless access to your complete medical history—creating a single source of truth for lifelong health management.
features: Structured, centralized medical records
Secure, cloud-based infrastructure
Instant access to reports and clinical documents
Continuous and longitudinal health tracking
Integrated family health record management
